title: Rizqy Amelia Zein
description:
I am a postdoc at Research Data & Methods Team, [Center of Advanced Internet Studies (CAIS)](https://www.cais-research.de/team/rizqy-amelia-zein/) and an assistant professor at [Universitas Airlangga](https://psikologi.unair.ac.id/dosen-rizqy-amelia-zein/)*. My research projects focus on three areas: examining how people relate to **scientific and religious** explanations; improving **the quality and precision** of psychological measures; and understanding people's **experiences with and epistemic relationships** to science.


*Untuk mahasiswa Universitas Airlangga, silakan [klik disini untuk mengakses Soalan Sering Ditanya (SSD)](https://ameliazein.notion.site/2d92b8a8ff398087a827dd7d69804f02?v=2d92b8a8ff3980029952000c7fe98a16&pvs=73)
